<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Exceptions; use Exception; use Spatie\Backup\BackupDestination\BackupDestination; /** * @method Exception getPrevious() */ class BackupFailed extends Exception { public ?BackupDestination $backupDestination = null; public static function from(Exception $exception): static { return new static($exception->getMessage(), $exception->getCode(), $exception); } public function destination(BackupDestination $backupDestination): static { $this->backupDestination = $backupDestination; return $this; } }
